title: Training Flip Top Tables
brand_hint: Brand unknown — search title to identify manufacturer

specs.manufacturer: Global Furniture Group / Offices to Go
specs.weight: 48" model: 61.9 lbs (28.08 kg); 60" model: 73.7 lbs (33.43 kg); 72" model: not confirmed
specs.materials: 1" thick thermally fused laminate top with factory-installed inserts; steel Y-leg base with integral modesty panel, powder-coat painted; locking casters
key_features: Single lever mechanism with integrated dual side locking when in use position
Steel Y-legs with integral modesty panel (Tungsten base finish only)
Flip-top/nesting: each table adds 5.25" to stack when nested for storage
Factory-installed top inserts connect top to leg assembly
Ships in 3 cartons, easy to assemble
specs.warranty: Laminate/wood veneer tables: limited lifetime warranty to original purchaser (Global Furniture Group standard); note: folding tables carry only 1-year — flip-top classification likely qualifies for lifetime coverage, but confirm with manufacturer
specs.notes: BBI lists this as 'Training Flip Top Tables' with SKU GLB-NL4824FT and offers 3 sizes: 24"x48", 24"x60", 24"x72". This is the Global Furniture Group Newland series, sold through the Offices to Go channel. Base finish is Tungsten only for the flip-top models. Laminate finishes are the full Newland palette (10 options). The warranty classification for flip-top vs. folding tables should be verified — Global's standard laminate table warranty is lifetime, but folding laminate tables are 1 year; flip-top nesting tables may fall in either category.
